accounts.name: migration_authority
docs: Capability PDA owned by the trusted migrator program. Anchor enforces
`is_signer`; the handler verifies the pubkey matches the expected
derivation. Together these prove the CPI originated from the migrator.

errors.name: SameMintPair
errors.msg: Cannot create pool with same token for both sides

errors.name: HookProgramNotExecutable
errors.msg: Hook program account is not executable

errors.name: HookReturnDataMissing
errors.msg: Hook return data missing or wrong program id

errors.name: HookReturnDataInvalid
errors.msg: Hook return data invalid length or could not deserialize

errors.name: UseCollectProtocolFees
errors.msg: Protocol fee position must be claimed via collect_protocol_fees
